overall.description: A cinematic establishing shot of a grand medieval great hall reminiscent of Hogwarts, featuring floating candle chandeliers, long dining tables filled with NPCs, stained glass windows, and warm firelight. The scene is rendered in a game engine with high-quality lighting and atmospheric effects.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic great hall with floating candle chandeliers and house tables

agents.ego_description: stationary elevated view overlooking the great hall from the entrance side

notable_agents.action: students seated at long dining tables eating and conversing

entered.detail: hundreds of floating candles suspended in mid-air providing warm illumination throughout the hall
tall gothic arched windows with blue stained glass showing night sky outside
large stone fireplace with active fire burning on the right wall
four long wooden dining tables running lengthwise through the hall with benches
vertical house banners hanging on the left stone wall

segments.scene_description: A static elevated view of a grand gothic great hall illuminated by floating candle chandeliers and fireplace light. Students are seated at long wooden dining tables beneath tall stained glass windows, while house banners hang on the stone walls. The atmosphere is warm and atmospheric with mixed lighting from candles and the dark blue night visible through the windows.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, elevated perspective of a grand gothic great hall that maintains a warm, atmospheric glow against the darkness of night. It begins with a wide view of the cavernous space, where floating candle chandeliers and flickering fireplace light illuminate the stone architecture. As the eye wanders across the room, the warm interior light contrasts with the deep blue night visible through tall, intricate stained glass windows. The scene remains poised, capturing students seated at long wooden dining tables while house banners hang motionless from the walls.
